title: Yuki's Sleepy Peek-a-Boo
synopsis: Little Yuki plays peek-a-boo with her favorite bedtime friends hiding around her room, discovering each one before settling down for a cozy night's sleep.

pages.text: Time for bed, little Yuki! But where are all her sleepy friends hiding?

illustration.description: Yuki with straight black hair with a red headband, light skin, almond-shaped dark brown eyes stands in her cozy bedroom, looking around curiously. Various objects like curtains, pillows, and blankets appear to be hiding something behind them.
illustration.alt: Yuki in her bedroom looking for hidden friends

pages.text: Peek-a-boo! Behind the curtain... it's Teddy Bear!

illustration.description: Yuki with straight black hair with a red headband, light skin, almond-shaped dark brown eyes pulls back a blue curtain to reveal a brown teddy bear that was hiding behind it. The teddy bear looks surprised and happy to be found.
illustration.alt: Yuki finding teddy bear behind curtain

pages.text: Peek-a-boo! Under the blanket... it's Bunny!

illustration.description: Yuki with straight black hair with a red headband, light skin, almond-shaped dark brown eyes lifts a soft pink blanket to discover a white bunny hiding underneath. The bunny's ears poke up as it's revealed.

pages.text: Peek-a-boo! Behind the pillow... it's Kitty!

illustration.description: Yuki with straight black hair with a red headband, light skin, almond-shaped dark brown eyes moves aside a fluffy white pillow to find an orange tabby cat curled up behind it. The cat stretches and yawns sleepily.
illustration.alt: Yuki finding sleepy cat behind pillow

pages.text: Now all friends are found! Time to snuggle and sleep. Good night, Yuki!

illustration.description: Yuki with straight black hair with a red headband, light skin, almond-shaped dark brown eyes lies peacefully in bed surrounded by her teddy bear, bunny, and cat. A gentle nightlight glows softly, and stars twinkle outside the window.
illustration.alt: Yuki sleeping peacefully with all her animal friends

metadata.illustrationStyle: lift the flap inspired, partially hidden objects, peek-a-boo composition, hiding and revealing, interactive feel, surprise element, behind the curtain, playful concealment

questions.question: Where was Teddy Bear hiding?
questions.explanation: Teddy Bear was hiding behind the blue curtain when Yuki found him!

questions.question: What was hiding under the blanket?
questions.explanation: The white bunny was hiding under the soft pink blanket!

questions.question: What does Yuki do at the end?
questions.explanation: After finding all her friends, Yuki snuggles with them and goes to sleep!
